hero.title: The digital home of Uzbek scholarship
hero.subtitle: Monografiya.com is Uzbekistan's unified academic publishing platform — for scholars, professors and students. Knowledge without barriers.

about.mission_quote: So every Uzbek scholar's voice can be heard
about.mission_body: For years monographs gathered dust on shelves and students relied on photocopies. We're changing that — building a platform where every academic publication is one click from a global audience.
about.values_subtitle: Every decision we make rests on four pillars.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.body: Every sale, every payout — visible to the author. No hidden fees.

access.title: Affordable price
access.body: Academic books should reach students too. Authors set prices; we encourage lower ones.

fair.title: Fair share
fair.body: 80% of every sale to the author — twice what other platforms offer.

scholarship.title: Academic rigor
scholarship.body: Serious moderation. Real scholarly publications, no plagiarism, no fake credentials.

upload.title: Upload your file
upload.body: PDF or EPUB. You set the title, abstract and price.

moderate.title: We review
moderate.body: An expert checks within 24–48 hours. Copyright and quality first.

sell.title: Goes on sale
sell.body: Once approved, your book hits the catalogue. Revenue lands in your account immediately.

about.for_authors_body: Publish your monograph without a publisher, bureaucracy or delays. All of Uzbekistan can read it at once.
about.for_authors_point2: Automatic Payme.uz payout, withdraw within 1 business day
about.for_authors_point3: Real-time analytics: who bought, from where, which pages they read
about.for_readers_body: Even when the university library is closed, the book you need is right here. Buy once — access forever.
about.for_readers_point1: Free preview pages before you buy
about.for_readers_point2: Read online or download — it's all yours
about.contact_title: Got a question? Write to us
about.contact_subtitle: Author, reader or partner — we listen to everyone.
about.contact_response: We usually reply within 1–2 business days.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Academic publishing, new books, author interviews
blog.coming_soon_body: The blog is under construction. Subscribe to our newsletter — we'll notify you when the first posts go live.
blog.empty_body: No articles yet. Our first posts are on the way.
blog.label: Article
blog.error_body: We're having trouble reaching the server. Try again in a few seconds.

legal.draft_body: This document is being drafted by our legal team. The full text will be published soon.
legal.draft_notice: This document is an MVP draft. A final version will be published after legal review.

terms.intro: By using Monografiya.com, you agree to the terms below. Please read this document carefully.
terms.account_p1: To open an account you must be at least 18 years old and provide accurate information.
terms.account_l1: One user, one account. Creating multiple accounts is prohibited.
terms.account_l2: Keeping your password and login details safe is your responsibility.
terms.account_l3: You are responsible for all activity in your account.
terms.content_p1: Every book, cover and article on the site is protected by copyright. Downloads are permitted for personal use only.
terms.content_p2: Redistributing, reselling or uploading purchased files to public networks is strictly prohibited.
terms.payments_p1: Payments are processed via Payme, Click, UzCard and other approved systems. Prices are in Uzbek soums.
terms.payments_l1: After payment, the book is added to your personal library immediately.
terms.payments_l2: Refunds for digital products are issued only in cases of technical failure.
terms.payments_l3: The final order amount is displayed before you go to payment.
terms.authors_p1: By registering as an author, you can publish your own works.
terms.authors_l1: 80% of revenue goes to the author, 20% to the platform.
terms.authors_l2: Every uploaded book goes through moderation (24–48 hours).
terms.authors_l3: Uploading content that infringes others' rights is not allowed — the account will be blocked.
terms.conduct_p1: Please treat other users with respect.
terms.conduct_l1: Spam, advertising and unlawful content are not allowed.
terms.conduct_l2: Threats or harassment of other users are grounds for immediate suspension.
terms.conduct_l3: Technical attacks or automated data collection are not permitted.
terms.termination_p1: We reserve the right to terminate accounts that violate these terms without notice. You may also delete your account at any time.
terms.liability_p1: The platform is provided "as is". We don't guarantee uninterrupted operation but work to minimise disruptions.
terms.changes_p1: These terms are updated periodically. We'll notify you of material changes by email.
terms.contact_p1: For questions or complaints, write to us:

privacy.intro: Monografiya.com takes your personal data seriously. This policy explains what we collect, why, and how we protect it.
privacy.collect_p1: We collect the following from you:
privacy.collect_l2: For the author profile: academic title, institution, bio, social links (if provided).
privacy.collect_l3: Orders and payments: list of books, total (card numbers are stored by Payme, we don't see them).
privacy.collect_l4: Technical: IP address, browser type, usage log (for security).
privacy.use_p1: We use the data we collect to:
privacy.use_l1: Manage your account and fulfil orders.
privacy.use_l2: Notify you about new publications and important updates (with your consent).
privacy.use_l3: Improve the platform and ensure security.
privacy.share_p1: We share data with third parties only when necessary:
privacy.share_l1: Payment systems (Payme, Click) — to process payments.
privacy.share_l2: Technical providers (hosting, email delivery) — under confidentiality agreements.
privacy.cookies_p1: The site uses cookies for convenience and analytics. Disabling cookies in your browser may break some features.
privacy.rights_l1: View and edit your personal information in your account.
privacy.rights_l4: Request a copy of the data we hold about you.
privacy.security_p1: Passwords are hashed with bcrypt. Card data isn't stored on our side. Connections are protected by HTTPS.
privacy.retention_p1: We keep data while your account is active. After deletion — fully removed within 30 days (except logs required by law).
privacy.changes_p1: We'll notify you in advance if this policy changes. Material changes — by email.
